title: LF01 Skillset
subtitle: Describe the company and your role in the organization
intro: LF01 provides the foundation for professional action in the training company.
The focus is on role, rights and duties, company understanding, market environment, team communication and presentation.

subsections.title: Classify the dual system and stakeholders
items: Name learning locations in the dual system correctly
Differentiate roles of the company, vocational school and other institutions
Explain collaboration between stakeholders in a practical way
Classify the trainer role tasks
Make communication channels between learning locations transparent

subsections.title: Apply rights and duties in training
items: Implement duties in training daily work correctly
Follow reporting paths when problems arise
Secure diligence and documentation duties
Respect role and responsibility boundaries
Show compliant behavior in the team

subsections.title: Classify labor rights and co-determination
items: Classify basic labor law frameworks
Name co-determination bodies and their tasks
Address conflict situations factually
Escalate concerns through appropriate channels
Strengthen fairness and accountability in the team

subsections.title: Manage career and life planning responsibly
items: Formulate learning goals for the training period
Plan time windows for professional development
Use feedback for personal development
Prioritize next qualification steps
Assess career perspectives realistically

subsections.title: Describe training company and corporate goals
items: Present corporate goals for the target audience
Explain organizational structure with roles and responsibilities
Distinguish corporate legal forms at a basic level
Describe inter-departmental connections clearly
Relate company structure to daily work

subsections.title: Classify value creation and business processes
items: Differentiate value creation stages in the company
Present business processes from request to delivery
Classify production factors and organizational resources
Name process interfaces between teams
Justify process improvements professionally

subsections.title: Analyze market environment and competition
items: Distinguish businesses and companies in the environment
Relate customer requirements to the service portfolio
Classify competition situations at a basic level
Relate market changes to the company
Make impacts on training areas transparent

subsections.title: Describe economic cycle and market situations
items: Explain the basics of economic cycles
Classify price, demand and supply situations
Relate economic effects to order volume
Interpret market data for decisions
Derive operational risks from market situations

subsections.title: Prepare and plan presentations in team work
items: Define presentation goals and target audiences
Align roles in team preparation
Prepare content in a structured way
Secure time planning for the presentation
Organize rehearsal and feedback loop

subsections.title: Deliver, control and reflect on presentations
items: Deliver the presentation appropriately for the audience
Answer questions professionally
Secure quality criteria during delivery
Collect team feedback in a structured way
Derive improvements for the next presentation

subsections.title: Documentation, self-check and closing reflection
items: Document work results in a traceable way
Analyze target vs actual deviations in the learning process
Formulate lessons learned for follow-up tasks
Prioritize improvement measures
Create a professional end-of-day closure
